text:
On Tue, 11 Jan 2000 hokiegrind@yahoo.com wrote:

> I have been trying to compile to gcc-2.8.1 from a clean install of 
> FreeBSD 3.3 and 3.4. Both FreeBSD 3.3 and 3.4 (default install 
> gcc-2.7.2.3) fail to compile  with the following error:

Are you using the port (ports/lang/gcc28)?
